details.IncidentDetail: "[39] DRIVER TRIED TO GET PHYSICAL W/ TOW CO , DELCINING TO PAY FEES"
"[38] NOW JUMPING IFO OF THE TOW TK AND PREVENTING TOW TK TO GET IN THE YARD [Shared]"
"[34] REFUSING TO GET OFF, ADVANTAGED 1039 STAA BUT IT HAS BEEN 1 HR AND 30 MINS SINCE "
"[33] RO NOT WANTING TO GET OO THE TOW TK , ADVANTAGE ADV THEM THEY COULD TAKE HIM TO HIS R BUT HE WOULD HAVE TO PAY, HAS BEEN ON TOW TK FOR ABOUT 3 HRS "
